last_cycle_summary: Completed one bounded integration-owner cycle. Re-read V1 planning/status, shared contracts, export package helper, frontend API source-index client, Remote Matter export package caller, Review Studio/eval status, and backend source-index route. Wired the local-only V1 source-index API into the actual RemoteMatterCommandCenter export package caller and passed the response to buildExportPackage, so downloaded AgentOps export packages now include the hashed source-index manifest when local source-index retrieval succeeds. Review-derived eval persistence remains explicitly scoped as a remaining caveat and is not claimed as durable.

integration_increment.implemented: RemoteMatterCommandCenter now fetches GET /aletheia/matters/:matterId/v1/source-index through listAletheiaV1SourceIndex and passes the returned V1SourceIndexSnapshot to buildExportPackage.
integration_increment.api_contract_typing: frontend/src/app/lib/aletheiaApi.ts now types AletheiaV1SourceIndex as V1SourceIndexSnapshot, matching the exportPackage consumer contract.
integration_increment.user_visible_result: The AgentOps export package panel shows source-index document/chunk/source-link counts and the downloaded JSON includes audit_pack.source_index_manifest plus matching package manifest counts in local storage mode.
integration_increment.supabase_behavior: If source-index retrieval fails, the UI states that the source-index manifest is omitted and that Supabase V1 source listing remains unavailable. No Supabase readiness is claimed.

preserved_constraints: No legal advice generation was implemented.
Final export gate semantics were not loosened; buildExportPackage and Gate Engine fail-closed behavior remain unchanged.
ProfessionalSkill activation was not changed; skills remain candidate-only until explicit expert approval.
No production SaaS, Supabase source-index, Supabase runtime persistence, external-provider, or legal-correctness readiness is claimed.
remaining_caveats: Review-derived eval cases still do not have durable review-resolution API/status semantics, so Deployment/Docs/Demo must not claim persisted review-derived eval workflows.
Supabase V1 document/chunk/source listing remains unavailable and must be documented as fail-closed/unimplemented.
Supabase V1 runtime persistence remains unavailable.
No public persistV1RuntimeResult route or approval retry wiring exists.
The updated Playwright route spec was not run in this bounded cycle because it depends on the UI smoke server/state setup.

launch_recommendation.reason: The concrete export caller now consumes the local source-index route end-to-end. Deployment/Docs/Demo may document and demo that local export path, but must explicitly label review-derived eval persistence, Supabase source listing, Supabase runtime persistence, public runtime persistence, approval retry wiring, and external providers as unavailable or planned.

next_actions: Supervisor should refresh the V1 rollup and decide whether Deployment/Docs/Demo can launch with the remaining caveats.
Deployment/Docs/Demo must describe the source-index manifest as local/private-pilot only and avoid persisted review-derived eval workflow claims.
A future backend/API or Review Studio cycle can add durable review-resolution state before eval docs claim persisted review-to-eval workflows.
